title: 补齐生成状态文件的归档 ownership 归属

sources.reason: Generated lifecycle status changed when this Work Item started and must be owned in the archived Summary.

riskAssessment.reason: Only generated status ownership evidence is being closed; no runtime behavior changes.

executionDecision.reason: Record generated status ownership and verify the archived PR bundle.

preReviewWarnings: Do not modify archived Work Item evidence.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The Summary explicitly owns the generated current_status.md path.
The Work Item finishes and archives with all required governance checks passed.
The PR ownership check reports no unowned current_status.md path.
No source behavior or public release state changes are introduced.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The no-active PR audit found current_status.md unowned after prior gate changes because generated status was not listed in the archived Summary changedFiles.
constraints: Do not change source behavior or publish.
intent.rationale: Generated status is a repository change and must have explicit Work Item ownership for the final PR audit to be trustworthy.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Generated current_status.md is owned by the active and then archived Work Item.
PR ownership reports no unowned path after archive.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: No restricted source path is changed.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
